author: @hkitservices
text: You need to re-post that video  after correcting the sound part - this is unwatchable as is :(

author: @stevetobias4890
text:
You really need to fix the volume on the computer microphone, so hard to hear you mate. Also why is the channel tinkeringntinkering instead of thinkingntinkering? Seems weird, also explains why I could not find you.
On the phone with volume maxed out I missed everything you said on the computer then when you went back to the video at the end you blasted me, not pleasant at all.

author: @YoureNowOnTV
text: Thanks for making this video Luke. I think it would be better to edit and re-upload with the audio levelled. 😊👍

text: Re edit please. We can't hear you ! And we want to :)

text:
